framework.name: Danish Transport Authority ICT Security Requirements
framework.scope: ICT security requirements for Danish transport sector including railway, aviation, maritime, and road transport
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by domains: governance, operational security per transport mode, incident management, safety/security integration, and supply chain.

controls.title: Cybersecurity policy for transport companies
controls.description: Transport companies covered by NIS2 must have an approved cybersecurity policy covering both IT and operational systems.
controls.description_nl: Transportvirksomheder omfattet af NIS2 skal have en godkendt cybersikkerhedspolitik der daekker bade IT- og operationelle systemer.

controls.title: Risk assessment for transport systems
controls.description: Transport companies must conduct risk assessment with particular focus on safety-critical systems and their cybersecurity.
controls.description_nl: Transportvirksomheder skal gennemfoere risikovurdering med saerligt fokus pa safety-kritiske systemer og deres cybersikkerhed.

controls.title: Cybersecurity for railway systems
controls.description: Railway systems including signaling systems, train control, and station systems must be protected against cyber attacks with particular regard to safety.
controls.description_nl: Jernbanesystemer inklusiv signalsystemer, togkontrol og stationssystemer skal beskyttes mod cyberangreb med saerlig hensyn til safety.
controls.implementation_guidance: Foelg CLC/TS 50701 standarden for cybersikkerhed i jernbanesystemer. Implementer sikkerhedszoner.

controls.title: ERTMS/ETCS security
controls.description: European Rail Traffic Management System (ERTMS) and European Train Control System (ETCS) installations must be protected against cyber threats.
controls.description_nl: European Rail Traffic Management System (ERTMS) og European Train Control System (ETCS) installationer skal beskyttes mod cybertrusler.

controls.title: Cybersecurity in aviation systems
controls.description: Aviation operators must implement cybersecurity in accordance with EASA requirements and national supplementary provisions.
controls.description_nl: Luftfartsoperatoerer skal implementere cybersikkerhed i henhold til EASA-krav og nationale supplerende bestemmelser.

controls.title: Maritime cybersecurity
controls.description: Shipping companies and ports must implement cybersecurity in accordance with IMO guidelines for maritime cybersecurity.
controls.description_nl: Rederier og havne skal implementere cybersikkerhed i overensstemmelse med IMOs retningslinjer for maritim cybersikkerhed.

controls.title: Cybersecurity for intelligent transport systems (ITS)
controls.description: Intelligent transport systems including traffic management and tunnel safety must be protected with cybersecurity measures.
controls.description_nl: Intelligente transportsystemer inklusiv trafikstyring og tunnelsikkerhed skal beskyttes med cybersikkerhedsforanstaltninger.

controls.title: Reporting of cyber incidents in transport sector
controls.description: Significant cyber incidents in the transport sector must be reported to the Danish Transport Authority and CFCS within NIS2 deadlines.
controls.description_nl: Vasentlige cyberhaendelser i transportsektoren skal rapporteres til Trafikstyrelsen og CFCS inden for NIS2-fristerne.

controls.title: Transport-specific cyber contingency plan
controls.description: Transport companies must have a cyber contingency plan that addresses both cybersecurity and safety consequences.
controls.description_nl: Transportvirksomheder skal have en cyberberedskabsplan der adresserer bade cybersikkerhed og safety-konsekvenser.

controls.title: Integration of safety and cybersecurity
controls.description: Cybersecurity measures in the transport sector must be integrated with safety management systems to ensure security measures do not compromise physical safety.
controls.description_nl: Cybersikkerhedsforanstaltninger i transportsektoren skal integreres med safety management systemer for at sikre at sikkerhedstiltag ikke kompromitterer fysisk sikkerhed.

controls.title: Cybersecurity in safety certification
controls.description: Cybersecurity must be included as an element in safety certification of transport infrastructure and systems.
controls.description_nl: Cybersikkerhed skal indga som element i safety-certificering af transportinfrastruktur og -systemer.

controls.title: Security requirements for transport vendors
controls.description: Vendors of IT and OT systems for the transport sector must comply with specific cybersecurity requirements defined by the Transport Authority.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerer af IT- og OT-systemer til transportsektoren skal overholde specifikke cybersikkerhedskrav defineret af Trafikstyrelsen.
